parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ impressions: null, likes: null, retweets: null, replies: null, bookmarks: null, performance_score: null, performance_label: null, checked_at: $json.results[0].checked_at }) }}

parameters.text:
={{ '🔥 DESTAQUE — @bodybasehealth

' + $('Build Report').first().json.virais.concat($('Build Report').first().json.bons).map(r => r.performance_label === 'viral' ? '🔥 VIRAL: ' : '✅ BOM: ' + r.tweet_text.substring(0, 100) + '...
👁 ' + r.impressions + ' imp • ❤️ ' + r.likes + ' likes
https://x.com/bodybasehealth/status/' + r.tweet_id).join('

') }}
